resources.string: Problem: Traditional learning often neglects the physical study environment and lacks a global community to motivate student performance.
Impact: Inadequate lighting can lead to eye strain, while the lack of peer comparison may result in reduced academic drive.
Solution: A smart platform integrating Light Sensors for eye health, Cloud APIs for daily insights, and Firebase for global rankings to ensure a holistic learning experience.
Are you sure you want to delete all courses and quiz history? This action cannot be undone.
